name: Int4/5/6 MLP3x + BigramHash + SmearGate + SWA
blurb: 11 layers with aggressive mixed quantization (int4 MLP fc, int5 MLP proj, int6 attention). BigramHash 12288 buckets for better collision resistance. SmearGate for bigram context. SWA start_frac=0.4. 3x MLP expansion. Mean target: 1.135 bpb.
author: Neiv Malaviya
